name: U.A. Perfect Ace
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｕ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウルトラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>パーフェクトエース
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Perfect Ace". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Perfect Ace" once per turn this way. Once per turn, during your opponent's turn, when a card or effect is activated: You can discard 1 card; negate that activation, and if you do, destroy it (this is a Quick Effect).
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Perfect Ace". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Perfect Ace" once per turn this way. Once per turn, during your opponent's turn, when a card or effect is activated: You can discard 1 card; negate that activation, and if you do, destroy it (this is a Quick Effect).
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Perfect Ace". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Perfect Ace" once per turn this way. Once per turn, during your opponent's turn, when a card or effect is activated: You can discard 1 card; negate that activation, and if you do, destroy it (this is a Quick Effect).

action: Returns from field to hand for Special Summon
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
